final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire modulated_signal,
    output reg carrier_signal
);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            carrier_signal <= 0;
        end else begin
            // Toggle the carrier_signal on the rising edge of the modulated_signal
            if (modulated_signal) begin
                carrier_signal <= ~carrier_signal;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
